title: Villagers to Pigmans
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e506f7bc8ee31a36c8d0b3fe5fd9f6632b545031.png)
#  "¡¡The pigmans populate villages now!!"
This texture pack turns the villagers and zombie villagers into "The Pigmans",  Miclee's original concept for villagers. REQUIRES OPTIFINE TO WORK!!!! 
¡We also added the original "trade coin" concept, Rubies!
![rubies and farmer pigman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28f9534a362508c91ab7b3c5177959825cd48177.png)
